title: Hey Jude: Bellingham's return to England indispensability
summary: Jude Bellingham has demonstrated his crucial importance to England's World Cup campaign, marking a remarkable resurgence in form. Senior correspondent Sami Mokbel charts his key contribution to the team's success.
content: Senior football correspondent Sami Mokbel charts Jude Bellingham's remarkable  resurgence with England at the World Cup.

zh.title: 嘿裘德：贝林厄姆对英格兰队不可或缺的回归
zh.summary: 贝林厄姆已经证明了自己对英格兰世界杯竞选的关键重要性，标志着其状态的显著复兴。资深记者萨米·莫克贝尔记述了他对球队成功的关键贡献。

title: O'Neill hints at Iheanacho & Saracchi talks - gossip
summary: Celtic manager O'Neill has hinted at negotiations to bring strikers Kelechi Iheanacho and Marcelo Saracchi back to the club. Meanwhile, Rangers appear close to securing Hearts midfielder Cammy Devlin.
content: Could Kelechi Iheanacho and Marcelo Saracchi be returning to Celtic? Elsewhere, Rangers are reportedly closing in on Cammy Devlin after his Hearts exit.

zh.title: 奥尼尔暗示与伊赫纳乔和萨拉奇的谈判 - 传闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人主教练奥尼尔暗示正在进行谈判，试图将前锋凯莱奇·伊赫纳乔和马塞洛·萨拉奇带回俱乐部。与此同时，流浪者队似乎即将签下哈茨中场坎米·德夫林。

title: When the World Cup finishes, the football continues on BBC Sport
summary: BBC Sport will maintain comprehensive coverage beyond the World Cup's conclusion, providing daily content and building anticipation for the upcoming football season. The network's commitment extends to pre-season buildup and extensive match coverage.
content: When the World Cup ends we'll still have loads of great content every day as we build up to the new football season.

zh.title: 当世界杯结束时，足球在BBC体育频道继续进行
zh.summary: BBC体育频道将在世界杯落幕后继续保持全面报道，提供日常内容并为即将到来的足球赛季营造期待。该网络的承诺延伸到赛前准备期和广泛的比赛报道。

title: Is it time to give record-breaker Pickford the credit he deserves?
summary: England goalkeeper Jordan Pickford has entered the World Cup history books with record achievements that deserve greater recognition. Chief football writer Phil McNulty examines whether the stopper finally receives due credit for his performances.
content: Is it time to finally give England keeper Jordan Pickford the credit he deserves as he enters the World Cup history books, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 该给创纪录者皮克福德应有的认可了吗？
zh.summary: 英格兰门神乔丹·皮克福德创造了世界杯历史纪录，其成就值得更多认可。首席足球记者菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂分析了这位门将是否最终获得了应有的表现肯定。

title: Artificial turf & coaching revolution - how Norway shaped golden generation
summary: Norway has built a golden generation of players through investment in artificial turf facilities and a collaborative coaching revolution that prioritizes teamwork over individual ego. The nation's strategic approach to player development has proven instrumental in creating world-class talent.
content: Artificial turf, investment from gambling and a coaching revolution based on collaboration over egos help Norway build a golden generation of players.

zh.title: 人工草坪与教练革命——挪威如何培育黄金一代
zh.summary: 挪威通过投资人工草坪设施和优先强调团队合作而非个人英雄主义的合作教练革命，培育了一代球员。这个国家对球员发展的战略性方法在创造世界级人才方面发挥了关键作用。

title: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
summary: England has progressed to the World Cup quarter-finals against Norway at Miami Stadium under manager Thomas Tuchel, accumulating multiple goals throughout their campaign. The article recaps all of England's scoring contributions to date.
content: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.

zh.title: 英格兰2026年世界杯迄今为止的所有进球
zh.summary: 在主教练托马斯·图赫尔的带领下，英格兰已进入迈阿密体育场对阵挪威的世界杯四分之一决赛，在整个赛事中累积了多个进球。这篇文章回顾了英格兰迄今为止的所有进球贡献。

title: Haaland has advantage over Man City team-mates
summary: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Micah Richards, Wayne Rooney, and Cesar Azpilicueta believe Erling Haaland will possess an advantage over his Manchester City teammates when England faces Norway. The striker's specific attributes give him an edge in the upcoming quarter-final.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Micah Richards, Wayne Rooney and Cesar Azpilicueta look ahead to England's match against Norway and feel that Erling Haaland will have an advantage over his Manchester City team-mates in the match.

zh.title: 哈兰德相比曼城队友拥有优势
zh.summary: BBC体育世界杯评论员米卡·理查兹、韦恩·鲁尼和塞萨尔·阿斯皮利奎塔认为，当英格兰对阵挪威时，埃尔林·哈兰德将相比曼城队友拥有优势。这位前锋的特定属性在即将到来的四分之一决赛中给他带来了优势。

title: England set for open-air Miami heat - but do Norway hold the edge?
summary: England will face unprecedented conditions playing in open-air Miami heat in their World Cup quarter-final against Norway, entering unfamiliar territory. The extreme temperatures could potentially benefit Norway in the matchup.
content: England will head into unknown territory at this World Cup when they face Norway in Miami - playing in searing temperatures.

zh.title: 英格兰面临迈阿密露天酷热 - 但挪威是否占优势？
zh.summary: 英格兰将在与挪威的世界杯四分之一决赛中面临前所未有的露天迈阿密酷热条件，进入陌生的领域。极端温度可能在比赛中对挪威有利。

title: Spain's Yamal: France should fear us in semifinal
summary: Spain's Lamine Yamal has expressed confidence that France should fear La Roja heading into their World Cup semifinal showdown in Arlington, Texas on Tuesday. Yamal's boldness reflects Spain's belief in their ability to compete for a World Cup title.
content: Lamine Yamal says France should fear Spain as the two nations gear up for a heavyweight World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday.

zh.title: 西班牙的亚马尔：法国应该在半决赛中害怕我们
zh.summary: 西班牙的拉米内·亚马尔表示有信心，法国应该害怕红衣军团，他们将在德克萨斯州阿灵顿周二进行世界杯半决赛对决。亚马尔的大胆反映了西班牙对他们竞争世界杯冠军能力的信心。

title: Kane says Haaland 'completely different' than me
summary: England striker Harry Kane has downplayed direct comparisons with Erling Haaland, emphasizing their different playing styles and strengths. Kane expressed confidence that England are positioned to peak in the latter stages of the World Cup.
content: Harry Kane played down comparisons with Erling Haaland on Friday and vowed England are ready to peak in the World Cup's latter stages.

zh.title: 凯恩表示哈兰德与我"完全不同"
zh.summary: 英格兰前锋哈里·凯恩淡化了与埃尔林·哈兰德的直接比较，强调了他们不同的风格和优势。凯恩表示相信英格兰有能力在世界杯后期阶段达到最佳状态。

title: Sources: Greenwood could opt for Fener or Atleti
summary: Mason Greenwood, under contract with Marseille through 2029, is considering offers from both Fenerbahçe and Atlético Madrid, according to sources. The former Manchester United player is exploring alternatives despite his current Ligue 1 commitment.
content: Former Manchester United player Mason Greenwood, who is under contract with Marseille through 2029, is considering offers from Fenerbahce and Atlético Madrid, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：格林伍德可能选择芬内巴切或马竞
zh.summary: 据消息人士透露，与马赛签约至2029年的梅森·格林伍德正在考虑来自费内巴切和马德里竞技的报价。这位前曼联球员正在探索替代选择，尽管他目前仍受法甲合同约束。

title: Spain strike late to book WC semifinal with France...
summary: Spain secured a 2-1 victory over Belgium in the World Cup quarterfinal with a decisive late goal, advancing to the semifinals to face France. A familiar face delivered the crucial winner for La Roja.
content: In an outcome that felt inevitable for most of the game, Spain beat Belgium 2-1 with a late goal from a familiar face Friday.

zh.title: 西班牙后发制人晋级世界杯半决赛对阵法国
zh.summary: 西班牙凭借一粒决定性的后期进球以2-1战胜比利时，赢得世界杯四分之一决赛，晋级半决赛对阵法国。一位熟悉的面孔为拉罗哈打进了关键一球。

title: Merino: 'Surreal' to net Spain's WC winner again
summary: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino came off the bench to score the crucial winning goal against Belgium with a 2-1 final score, advancing La Roja to the World Cup semifinals. Merino described the moment as surreal, reflecting his impact in the decisive match.
content: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino came off the bench to score a late winning goal against Belgium, securing a 2-1 victory and advancing La Roja to the World Cup semifinals.

zh.title: 梅里诺："不真实"的西班牙世界杯胜球者
zh.summary: 西班牙中场球员梅里诺替补出场，打入关键球帮助球队2-1击败比利时，晋级世界杯半决赛。梅里诺将这一时刻形容为"不真实的"，体现了他在这场决定性比赛中的重要作用。

title: Romero says leaky Argentina defense 'bothers us'
summary: Argentina defender Cristian Romero has acknowledged his team's ongoing defensive vulnerabilities ahead of the World Cup quarterfinal against Switzerland at Arrowhead Stadium on Saturday. The defensive issues are a concern for Argentina's prospects in the tournament.
content: Argentina defender Cristian Romero pointed out the ongoing defensive issues his team must fix to be successful in the quarterfinal match against Switzerland on Saturday at Arrowhead Stadium.

zh.title: 罗梅罗说漏洞百出的阿根廷防线"困扰我们"
zh.summary: 阿根廷后卫克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗在世界杯四分之一决赛对阵瑞士前承认球队存在的防线漏洞。这些防线问题令人担忧，将影响阿根廷在锦标赛中的前景。

title: Merino sends Spain to the semis, but La Roja need ...
summary: Mikel Merino's late goal sent Spain to the World Cup semifinals with victory over Belgium, yet the team exposed vulnerabilities in scoring despite possessing talented forward Lamine Yamal. Spain's advancement masks underlying issues that must be addressed.
content: You'd think a team boasting Lamine Yamal would score goals for fun, but to beat Belgium, Spain needed midfielder Mikel Merino to net the winner.

zh.title: 梅里诺送西班牙进半决赛，但西班牙红衣军团需要...
zh.summary: 梅里诺的晚期进球助西班牙战胜比利时挺进世界杯半决赛，但球队在进攻端暴露出漏洞，尽管拥有天才前锋拉米内·亚马尔。西班牙的晋级掩盖了必须解决的潜在问题。
